title: keeping it a band by Halos1
lyrics: 808 caught the jam DJ Flair, make the money flare Everywhere I go, I keep a pocket full of dough Everywhere I go, I keep a wallet full of dough Nah, fuck that, let's be honest Every single month, I be waitin' on my food stamps And if I wasn't rappin', I'd be homeless, thinkin', damn I am not a grown man, even though I'm grown, man Keep a foil in my hand, block as hot as oil in the pan Poppin' bowls till they boil and they burn, boys, take it Boy, I stay sellin' work, so I smoke for free I mean, hopefully, I make my re-up Big bro in blue dreads, bangin' C's up Amoebra I've been spittin' myself so many ways that I feel like Amoeba Stretchin' myself way too thin, and these drugs don't help Bein' a thug don't help, I created my own hell, I refuse to ask for help Since 1993, I've been tryin' to set my mind free Mind died down by these high beams As life strikes me like lightning, I keep fightin' The only feasible outcome, outgunned and eye-strung I run into the same nightmares that I've had since I was young So I run, run, run, run away real fast Take a blast of the glass, knock me back on my ass So I run, run, run, run away real fast Take a blast of the glass, knock me back on my ass There's no more rebels in the fridge Business getting thin when the pixie burstin' in And now the business is extinct and I ain't seen it straight in weeks Exist among the weak, but tell myself there's nothing wrong with fighting Exist among the weak, but tell myself there's nothing wrong with fighting Sent to Earth, I don't see the change among the species That's so vibrant with the veins of Mother Nature Views long since changed from that of common legislature Creepin' in prescriptions, I'm showin' symptoms of withdrawal But this placeron smile tells you there's nothing wrong Still I make a beat with my index and middle To represent the peace when I speak and start to spittle With no doubt in your thoughts you would've thought he brought a chisel But that's the magic of a pizzle, misery my company bunkered me Till your thoughts crack like Humpty Dumpty, he is me Guess I'll lean since at the brink of going extinct So rest in peace Pourin' out this drink for Peter Seems like we pourin' out liters

lyricsSegments.text: 808 caught the jam
DJ Flair, make the money flare
Everywhere I go, I keep a pocket full of dough
Everywhere I go, I keep a wallet full of dough
Nah, fuck that, let's be honest
Every single month, I be waitin' on my food stamps
And if I wasn't rappin', I'd be homeless, thinkin', damn
I am not a grown man, even though I'm grown, man
Keep a foil in my hand, block as hot as oil in the pan
Poppin' bowls till they boil and they burn, boys, take it
Boy, I stay sellin' work, so I smoke for free
I mean, hopefully, I make my re-up
Big bro in blue dreads, bangin' C's up Amoebra
I've been spittin' myself so many ways that I feel like Amoeba
Stretchin' myself way too thin, and these drugs don't help
Bein' a thug don't help, I created my own hell, I refuse to ask for help
Since 1993, I've been tryin' to set my mind free
Mind died down by these high beams
As life strikes me like lightning, I keep fightin'
The only feasible outcome, outgunned and eye-strung
I run into the same nightmares that I've had since I was young
So I run, run, run, run away real fast
Take a blast of the glass, knock me back on my ass
So I run, run, run, run away real fast
Take a blast of the glass, knock me back on my ass
There's no more rebels in the fridge
Business getting thin when the pixie burstin' in
And now the business is extinct and I ain't seen it straight in weeks
Exist among the weak, but tell myself there's nothing wrong with fighting
Exist among the weak, but tell myself there's nothing wrong with fighting
Sent to Earth, I don't see the change among the species
That's so vibrant with the veins of Mother Nature
Views long since changed from that of common legislature
Creepin' in prescriptions, I'm showin' symptoms of withdrawal
But this placeron smile tells you there's nothing wrong
Still I make a beat with my index and middle
To represent the peace when I speak and start to spittle
With no doubt in your thoughts you would've thought he brought a chisel
But that's the magic of a pizzle, misery my company bunkered me
Till your thoughts crack like Humpty Dumpty, he is me
Guess I'll lean since at the brink of going extinct
So rest in peace
Pourin' out this drink for Peter
Seems like we pourin' out liters
